copy: Often used to prepare parts for painting or powder coating, these water-based cleaners remove dirt, grease, metal residue, and mold-release lubricants. You can also use them to clean stainless steel prior to passivation. Free of fragrances and dyes, they rinse clean without leaving a residue. They contain corrosion inhibitors for long-lasting surface protection. Clean parts by soaking, scrubbing, or using a pressure washer.
